Objectives: Establish Government Cloud org with FedRAMP Moderate compliance, obtain USDA Authority to Operate (ATO), and configure core reservation engine data model
Success Criteria: USDA ATO obtained; Government Cloud org configured with Shield encryption; Login.gov SSO operational; MFA enforced for government users; core reservation objects deployed with sample data for 10+ facilities; business rules engine validates booking windows in sandbox
Dependencies: None (greenfield). Requires Government to provide Login.gov sandbox credentials and USDA CISO coordination for ATO application.
Risks: ATO timeline risk (6-9 months typical, may extend to 12+ months); business rules complexity may surface edge cases requiring rework in Phase 2; Login.gov sandbox environment availability uncertain

Objectives: Launch minimum viable product (MVP) for public users: mobile-first reservation portal with advanced search, booking workflows, integrated payment processing, and omni-channel contact center
Success Criteria: Experience Cloud site live with custom LWC map component; Login.gov SSO operational for public users; booking workflows functional for 3+ inventory types; Worldpay payment integration operational; Service Cloud Voice contact center operational; Section 508/WCAG Level AA compliance validated; load testing confirms 48M annual visitor capacity
Dependencies: Phase 1 complete (requires ATO + reservation engine data model). Requires Government toll-free number and Worldpay production credentials.
Risks: Map integration complexity (custom LWC may extend 1-2 sprints); Worldpay API documentation gaps; peak load performance requires extensive testing; Section 508 compliance remediation may extend UAT timeline

Objectives: Enable back-office operations for 5,000 internal stakeholders via partner community portals with offline mobile capability. Establish RIDB as aggregation hub. Migrate 21M+ historical reservations from incumbent system.
Success Criteria: Partner Community operational with role-based access for 8 agencies; offline mobile app validated at 3+ field sites; business rule configuration UI functional for APMs; Data Cloud connectors operational for 8 agency CMS; RIDB public API delivering bulk CSV downloads; phased data migration complete with parallel operations validation; <1% error rate
Dependencies: Phase 2 complete (requires public portal operational). Requires incumbent contractor cooperation per SOO Section 6.3 and agency CMS API credentials.
Risks: Offline mobile sync conflicts; incumbent contractor may not fully document business rules (reverse-engineering required); data quality issues may extend cleansing timeline; 21M+ record volume requires Bulk API optimization; parallel operations critical for catching data integrity issues

Epics Included: Establish operational visibility via CRM Analytics dashboards. Deliver comprehensive training programs. Configure Agile program management practices. Marketing Cloud enhancement flagged as optional.
Dependencies: CRM Analytics dashboards operational; standard QASP reports automated; ad-hoc query builder functional for APMs; training programs delivered; DevOps Center configured with GitHub deployment pipeline; system documentation complete; Marketing Cloud decision confirmed
Risks: Phase 3 complete (requires operational data for meaningful analytics). Training requires stable system.
column8: Dashboard requirements may evolve during stakeholder review; CRM Analytics licensing cost scales with 5,000+ internal users; training effectiveness depends on Government user engagement; Marketing Cloud likely deferred to post-MVP; DevOps Center learning curve for Government IT staff
